---
title: "MoML — Molecular Machine Learning"
subtitle: "Lead: Ozlem Ozmen Garibay · University of Central Florida"
description: "MoML focuses on molecular machine learning, drug-target interaction prediction, molecular generation, diffusion models, and AI-assisted biological discovery."
---

## About MoML

**MoML** focuses on **molecular machine learning**, **interpretable models for drug discovery**, **drug-target interaction prediction**, **molecular generation**, **diffusion models**, and **AI-assisted biological discovery**. The group connects machine learning, NLP-inspired modeling, graph-based molecular learning, and explainable AI to support computational drug discovery and BioAI research.

## Lead

::: {.bm-person-card}
::: {.bm-person-photo}
![Headshot of Ozlem Ozmen Garibay](../assets/people/ozlem-garibay.jpeg)
:::
### Ozlem Ozmen Garibay
[Assistant Professor, IEMS · UCF]{.bm-person-role}
[Lead, MoML · Director, Human-CAIR]{.bm-person-affil}

Research in molecular machine learning, BioAI, generative discovery, interpretable molecular AI, and AI-assisted drug discovery.

::: {.bm-person-links}
[Profile](../people/faculty.qmd#ozlem-ozmen-garibay)
[Email](mailto:ozlem@ucf.edu)
[UCF profile](https://www.cecs.ucf.edu/faculty/ozlem-ozmen-garibay/)
[Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=0RKzNtIAAAAJ&hl=en)
:::
:::

## Connection to BioMIND

Within BioMIND, MoML anchors **molecular intelligence**, **drug discovery**, **interpretable molecular AI**, and **generative discovery**.

## Research themes

::: {.bm-grid .bm-grid-2}

::: {.bm-card}
### Molecular machine learning
Graph-based, geometric, and equivariant models for molecules.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Drug-target interaction prediction
Interpretable, attention-based, and NLP-inspired DTI models.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### AI-assisted drug discovery
End-to-end pipelines combining prediction, generation, and prioritization.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Graph-based molecular learning
Message passing and structure-aware networks for property prediction and design.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Molecular generation
Diffusion, autoregressive, and goal-conditioned generative models.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Diffusion models
Structure-conditioned diffusion, Best-of-K alignment, and Best-of-N sampling.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Interpretable BioAI
Attribution, attention, and concept-based explanations for biomolecular models.
:::

:::

## Flagship outputs

- [**AttentionSiteDTI**](../publications/index.qmd) — interpretable graph-based DTI prediction (*Briefings in Bioinformatics*, 2022)
- [**UnbiasedDTI**](../publications/index.qmd) — bias-aware DTI with ensemble-balanced learning (*Molecules*, 2022)
- [**BoKDiff**](../publications/index.qmd) — Best-of-K diffusion alignment for 3D molecule generation (*Bioinformatics Advances*, 2025)
- [**BindingSite-AugmentedDTA**](../publications/index.qmd) — interpretable drug repurposing pipeline (*Briefings in Bioinformatics*, 2023)

## People

MoML members are listed centrally on the BioMIND [People](../people/index.qmd) page.

## Publications and news

See the [Publications](../publications/index.qmd) and [News](../news/index.qmd) pages for MoML contributions.
